BurnLens Icon 512px (Landing)
nodes.description: Dark-themed radar/crosshair icon at 512px. Concentric teal circles on dark navy background with glowing cyan center dot, orange arc accent with dot markers, corner bracket marks suggesting a viewfinder/lens motif. Primary brand icon for BurnLens.

nodes.label: BurnLens Icon 32px (Landing)
nodes.description: Favicon-sized 32px version of the BurnLens radar icon. Same concentric circle design scaled down for browser tabs and small UI contexts.

nodes.label: BurnLens Wide Logo (Landing)
nodes.description: Wide horizontal logo combining the radar icon on the left with bold white 'BURNLENS' text and 'LLM API COST TRACKER' subtitle. Dark background with teal vertical grid lines. Used for headers, banners, and social preview cards.

nodes.label: BurnLens Icon 32px (Dashboard)
nodes.description: 32px favicon used in the dashboard static assets. Same radar icon design, served by the FastAPI dashboard for browser tab display.

nodes.label: BurnLens Logo 800px (Docs)
nodes.description: Large 800px square logo with radar icon centered, 'BURNLENS' title and 'LLM API COST TRACKER' subtitle at bottom. Includes 'v0.1.1 · OPEN SOURCE · MIT' version badge at top. Dark background. Used for documentation and README.

nodes.label: BurnLens Icon 512px (Docs)
nodes.description: 512px radar icon for documentation use. Identical to landing version: dark background, teal concentric circles, cyan glow center, orange arc accent, corner bracket marks.

nodes.label: BurnLens Icon 512px Alt (Docs)
nodes.description: Alternate icon variant at 512px with simplified design: dark circular background, white/light gray concentric circles and crosshair lines, cyan gradient center, orange arc with dot. No corner brackets. Cleaner, more minimal style suited for dark UI contexts.

nodes.label: BurnLens Icon Light 512px (Docs)
nodes.description: Light-theme variant of the BurnLens icon at 512px. White/transparent background with teal concentric circles, teal crosshair lines, cyan gradient center, orange arc accent. Designed for light backgrounds in documentation and print contexts.

nodes.label: BurnLens Icon 32px (Docs)
nodes.description: 32px favicon for documentation pages. Same radar/crosshair motif scaled to favicon size.

nodes.label: BurnLens Wide Logo (Docs)
nodes.description: Wide horizontal logo for documentation. Identical to landing version: radar icon left, bold 'BURNLENS' text, 'LLM API COST TRACKER' subtitle, dark background with teal grid lines.

nodes.label: BurnLens Brand Identity
nodes.description: Conceptual node representing the BurnLens visual brand system: radar/crosshair motif symbolizing monitoring and cost tracking, teal and dark navy color palette, orange accent for data points, 'lens' viewfinder corners.
